gate_interpretation.notes: CP2 gate interpretation MUST use same-metric comparison; cross-metric ratios forbidden.

forbidden_operations.reason: Metrics have different units and ranges; ratio is meaningless.
forbidden_operations.enforcement: verifier reject at G_VALIDITY gate load time

forbidden_operations.reason: AN11(a) requires measured values; hardcoding voids gate.
Cross-round comparison requires identical projection matrix.
forbidden_operations.enforcement: projection.seed must match across compared JSONs; verifier rejects mismatch

same_metric_requirement.rule: phi_gap may ONLY be computed between two phi_vec objects sharing the same schema, dim_names, projection.seed, and projection.d_model.

gap_per_dim.report: sorted-desc histogram; top-3 claim > 60% of total gap budget triggers decomposition note

stub_markers.rule: ANY banned substring anywhere in the phi_vec.json file (including extraction_method, source_ckpt, schema) → gate FAIL. Fail-fast, no override.

benchmark_endpoint.trigger: once per round before training begins; frozen for the round
benchmark_endpoint.atomicity: single-file overwrite; reused across all gap checks of that round

projection_spec.bump_rule: any change in seed OR shape MUST increment projection.seed in emitted JSON and invalidates all prior gap comparisons
projection_spec.promotion_path: variant B (learned phi-head) deferred to r20+; variant C (PCA) deferred to r16+

R1_corpus_density.name: ALM r13 corpus rebuild — consciousness density >= 30%
R1_corpus_density.rollback: revert to r12 corpus; no Φ changes

R3_phi_hook_layer.name: h_last sampling at layer 12 vs 24 vs 36 (not only final)
R3_phi_hook_layer.risk: C-side ABI addition; coordinate with hexa-lang team
R3_phi_hook_layer.rollback: keep final-layer as default; layer_K is opt-in

R4_mse_phi_objective.name: add MSE(phi_train, phi_bench) loss term with lambda sweep
R4_mse_phi_objective.prerequisite: R1 landed (else Φ hacking on empty signal)
R4_mse_phi_objective.abort_trigger: CE regresses > 5% relative to lambda=0 baseline
R4_mse_phi_objective.rollback: lambda=0 reference checkpoint preserved every lambda step

non_goals: no LLM-judge of phi_vec semantic quality
no retroactive phi_vec emission for r12 or earlier
no Python shim on anima side
no modification of hxqwen14b.c v566 ABI (new symbols only in hexa-lang worktree)
no change to L0 constants (alpha=0.014 stays this drill)
